operation.description: The canopy operation to execute, classified from user input against constants/operation-detection.md

platform.description: Execution platform: claude if .claude/ is the active base directory, copilot if .github/

available_platforms.description: Platforms detected in the repo: includes claude if .claude/ exists, copilot if .github/ exists

explicit_target_platform.description: Platform explicitly requested by user in their input (e.g. 'create for copilot', 'install cross-client'), or null if not stated. 'cross-client' targets the agentskills.io .agents/skills/ location which serves both Claude Code and Copilot.

repo_context.description: Repo type: 'distribution' if skills/ exists at repo root (a skill-distribution repo), 'consumer' otherwise (a project that consumes skills via .claude/skills/, .github/skills/, or .agents/skills/). Determines where CREATE and SCAFFOLD write new skills.

target_skill.description: Kebab-case skill name extracted from user input, or null if not mentioned

extra_context.description: Any additional context from user input relevant to the operation
